seoTitle: Woorree vs Worsley — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Woorree and Worsley. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Woorree and Worsley.
heading: Woorree vs Worsley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Woorree, Western Australia and Worsley, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Woorree has a lower overall climate risk score (26/100) compared to Worsley (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Woorree or Worsley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Woorree has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Worsley scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Woorree scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Worsley scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Woorree or Worsley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Woorree has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.13% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
